About Us

The main aim of our department is to provide our students with up-to-date and well-grounded theoretical and practical knowledge and skills in the field of psychology. In line with this aim, we have formed our academic staff from faculty members who have completed their education in leading universities in Türkiye, Europe and the USA, specialized in various subfields of psychology, and have published internationally and nationally.

Our graduates are expected to

comprehend the relationships between the subfields of psychology and other disciplines,

understand and question mental and emotional processes,

be able to examine personal psychological issues,

develop suggestions for the improvement of current psychological practices,

research,

adhere to ethical principles,

be able to take responsibility,

be productive,

be able to communicate effectively,

be individuals who value intercultural and interpersonal differences.

Through the applied courses in our program, we train graduates who have developed the ability to practice at the end of their four-year undergraduate education and stand out among other psychology graduates with these skills.

Our graduates will have a wide range of employment opportunities in various sectors, including:

Institutions and organizations affiliated with the Ministry of Health

Educational institutions, such as schools

Institutions and organizations affiliated with the Ministry of Justice

Institutions and organizations affiliated with the Ministry of Family and Social Policies

Institutions and organizations affiliated with the Ministry of Labor and Social Security

Kindergartens and preschools

Guidance and psychological counseling centers

Private or public mental health units

Private or public human resources units

Public opinion and market research companies

By offering a diverse set of career paths, we aim to empower our graduates to thrive in their chosen fields and make a positive impact on society.
